blog_title: Top Things To Do In Dubai During Winter On Your Honeymoon Trip
seo_title: Top Things To Do In Dubai During Winter On Your Honeymoon Trip
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Wed Jun 18 2025

Dubai, a city of opulence and modern marvels, transforms into a magical winter wonderland during the cooler months. If you are planning a honeymoon trip to this extravagant destination, winter is the perfect time to experience the best of Dubai. From romantic desert excursions to luxurious dining experiences, here are the top things to do in Dubai during winter on your honeymoon.

What are the top things to do in Dubai during winter on your honeymoon trip?

Make the most of the best honeymoon tour of Dubai with these activities. Bank on a top-rated travel agency in Kolkata for the best experience.

Go on Sunset Desert Safari:

Begin your romantic escapade with a breathtaking sunset desert safari. Venture into the golden dunes of the Arabian Desert as the sun dips below the horizon, casting a warm glow across the landscape.

Hold hands as you ride a camel together, feeling the serenity of the desert, and capture stunning photographs that will forever remind you of this magical moment. Many tour operators offer packages that include a private dinner under the stars, enhancing the romantic ambiance.

Enjoy a Hot Air Balloon Ride:

For a truly enchanting experience, take to the skies with a hot air balloon ride over the Dubai desert. As you soar above the dunes, relish the unparalleled views of the sunrise casting a kaleidoscope of colors across the landscape. This intimate and unique adventure will undoubtedly create unforgettable memories that you will cherish for a lifetime.

Romantic Dinner Cruise:

Dubai’s coastline is adorned with glittering skyscrapers and iconic landmarks, making it an ideal setting for a romantic dinner cruise. Sail along the Dubai Marina or Creek on a luxury yacht, savoring a gourmet meal under the starlit sky.

The cityscape, illuminated against the darkness, creates a mesmerizing backdrop for a romantic evening. Some cruises on the best honeymoon package of Dubai from Kolkata even offer live entertainment, ensuring a perfect blend of luxury and romance.

Explore Old Dubai:

While Dubai is renowned for its modern architecture, do not miss the opportunity to explore the charming and historic side of the city. Wander through the narrow lanes of Al Fahidi Historical District, also known as Al Bastakiya, where you will discover restored traditional houses, art galleries, and quaint cafes. Visit the Dubai Museum housed in the Al Fahidi Fort to gain insights into the city’s rich heritage.

Stroll in the Miracle Garden:

Dubai Miracle Garden, a floral paradise in the heart of the desert, is a must-visit during the winter season. Stroll hand in hand through the vibrant gardens featuring over 150 million flowers arranged in stunning designs. The garden is a visual spectacle, offering the perfect backdrop for romantic moments and colorful snapshots.

Go skiing in the desert:

Escape the desert heat and experience winter sports in the heart of the city at Ski Dubai, located in the Mall of the Emirates. Enjoy the thrill of skiing or snowboarding on real snow, surrounded by a winter wonderland setting. This unique indoor ski resort is the perfect blend of adventure and romance, providing a one-of-a-kind experience for honeymooners.

Enjoy a beach picnic at Jumeirah Beach:

Dubai’s beaches are not just for sunbathing. Plan a romantic picnic on the pristine shores of Jumeirah Beach, where you can relax on the soft sands and enjoy the gentle sea breeze. Pack a basket with your favorite treats and unwind with your spouse as you watch the sunset over the Arabian Gulf, casting a warm and romantic glow over the horizon. A travel agency can help you to make the most of your Dubai trip.
